T0141.title: Instant-Scan Pack
keywords: Scan As Soon As You Send It
T0141.definition: A rapid QR code payment action required when a payment code is displayed, as these codes are time-sensitive. To avoid expiration, the code must be scanned immediately by a merchant device or another user's scanning function to complete the transaction.
T0141.description: A rapid QR code payment action required when a payment code is displayed, as these codes are time-sensitive. To avoid expiration, the code must be scanned immediately by a merchant device or another user's scanning function to complete the transaction.
T0141.usageExample: “群里一直催‘发就扫’，我码刚出来不到十秒就被扫走了，根本来不及反应。”
